title: HR Officer
description: Support HR operations across recruitment, employee relations, and onboarding for multiple clients.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field. 2+ years of HR experience. Strong knowledge of Ethiopian labor regulations.

title: Administration Coordinator
description: Manage office operations, vendor communication, and administrative workflows to keep our teams running smoothly.
requirements: Diploma or Bachelor's in Business Administration or a related field. Strong organizational skills and experience with office systems.

title: Finance & Accounting Specialist
description: Prepare financial reports, manage reconciliations, and support payroll and accounting operations for client accounts.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field. 3+ years of accounting experience and strong Excel skills.

title: Logistics Coordinator
description: Coordinate inbound and outbound shipments, vendor schedules, and warehouse operations for supply chain projects.
requirements: Diploma or Bachelor's in Logistics, Supply Chain, or Business. 2+ years of logistics or freight coordination experience.

title: Transport Supervisor
description: Oversee driver teams, route planning, and vehicle safety protocols for transportation operations.
requirements: Minimum diploma. 3+ years of transport supervision experience and strong knowledge of fleet management.

title: Maintenance Engineer
description: Support technical maintenance, equipment troubleshooting, and electrical systems for client sites.
requirements: Bachelor's in Engineering, Technical Training, or related field. 2+ years of site maintenance experience.

title: Marketing Executive
description: Drive branding, digital campaigns, and lead generation for our talent sourcing services.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field. 2+ years of marketing experience with strong digital skills.

title: QC & HSE Officer
description: Monitor quality control and health, safety, and environment standards across client operations.
requirements: Diploma or degree in Safety, Engineering, or related field. 2+ years of QC/HSE experience and strong compliance awareness.

title: IT Support Technician
description: Provide end-user support, system troubleshooting, and network assistance for office teams and remote clients.
requirements: Diploma or Bachelor's in IT, Computer Science, or related field. 2+ years of technical support experience.

title: Hospitality Experience Associate
description: Deliver guest support, customer service, and front-desk coordination for hospitality clients.
requirements: Customer service experience preferred. Strong communication skills and a warm, professional attitude.

title: Internship Trainee
description: Join our team as an intern and gain hands-on experience in recruitment, administration, and HR operations.
requirements: Students or fresh graduates welcome. Strong motivation, communication skills, and willingness to learn.
